attributes.description: Alerts when `redis_mem_fragmentation_ratio > 1.5` on shards > 10 MB. High fragmentation wastes memory.
attributes.name: [Redis Enterprise OTel] Shard high memory fragmentation

investigation_guide.blob:
## Redis Enterprise shard high memory fragmentation

### What fired
Average fragmentation ratio > 1.5 on a shard with > 10 MB used.

### Why it matters
Fragmentation ratio > 1.5 wastes memory. Chronic fragmentation may require a shard restart (memory compaction) to reclaim.

### Triage
1. Check shard growth and deletion patterns.

### Remediation
- Use `MEMORY PURGE` or restart the shard.

### Tuning
- 1.5 threshold; skip small shards.
